title: Kavacha Plugin Manifest
description: kavacha-plugin.json at the root of a plugin package, sideloaded into the profile at kavacha-plugins/<id>/. A plugin reaches the browser ONLY through the Kavacha SDK (KavachaSDK.forPlugin(id)), and only for capabilities the user has explicitly granted. The permission enum is deliberately limited to workspaces/tabs/notes/commands: passwords, saved credentials, autofill, browsing history, and other private data are structurally excluded and can never be requested or granted.

id.description: Unique kebab-case plugin id, e.g. 'zotero-bridge'. Also the profile directory name (kavacha-plugins/<id>/) and the command-registry source key (plugin:<id>).

version.description: Semver; the marketplace uses this for updates.

entry.description: Relative path (within the plugin directory) to the plugin's ES module entry point. It must export activate(sdk) and may export deactivate().

permissions.description: Capabilities the plugin requests. Each must be granted by the user (about:plugins) before it takes effect. NOTE: passwords, saved credentials, autofill, and browsing history are NEVER grantable — the enum has no value for them by design, and the permission model rejects anything outside it.

kavachaMinVersion.description: Minimum Kavacha version this plugin supports.
